decision.value: Move report generation to background jobs

tradeoff.value: Users wait but API capacity is protected
tradeoff.evidence: Users will wait a little, but the request can return immediately.

alternative.value: Generate monthly reports inside the request
alternative.evidence: Generating the monthly report inside the request

architecture_change.value: Workers claim PostgreSQL rows with SKIP LOCKED
architecture_change.evidence: workers claim rows with SKIP LOCKED

open_question.value: Whether billing jobs need their own queue
open_question.evidence: Do billing jobs need their own queue
